message:
fix: reduce excessive header spacing on My Clusters page (#9427)

The DashboardPage component used pt-16 (64px) top padding, which stacked
on top of the Layout's own navbar-height padding, creating a large empty
gap between the nav bar and page content. Reduced to pt-4 (16px) to match
the home Dashboard page spacing.

Fixes #9425

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
